data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Committed fix (55597060) correctly routes knots parent beats through single-beat Take path instead of Scene orchestration by introducing effectiveParent flag in terminal-manager.ts. UI updated to show Take\!/blue for knots parents, Scene\!/purple for beads parents via _memoryManagerType threaded through BeatWithRepo. 3 new test files with good routing and prompt-wrapping coverage. All 1994 tests pass, typecheck clean. No beads regression. Note: 10 uncommitted working tree files contain separate follow-up work with 1 failing test (knots-backend.test.ts:551) — outside this beat's scope.
